sections.heading: About Golden Gear Automotive
body: $30 Value. Limit one per customer. Some restrictions may apply. Cannot be combined with any other offer or special. Coupon must be presented in advance.

At Golden Gear Automotive, our family-owned and operated auto repair shop, we pride ourselves on servicing a diverse range of vehicles, ensuring every customer’s car receives the expert attention it deserves. From everyday drivers to luxury imports and high-performance vehicles, our ASE Blue Seal Certified technicians have the skills and tools to work on all makes and models. Whether you drive a Toyota, Honda, or Ford, our team delivers reliable repairs and maintenance tailored specifically to your vehicle.

items.title: Services Vehicles
items.description: Real experience behind every services vehicles job, big or small.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Golden Gear Automotive and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.
